name: lol-overlay-native
description: Overlay de escritorio para League of Legends usando las APIs oficiales (Live Client Data + LCU) sin leer memoria ni inyectar.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && npm run copy:assets
scripts.collect: npm run build:collector && node dist/collector/index.js collect
scripts.aggregate: npm run build:collector && node dist/collector/index.js aggregate
